title: An Immortal Challenger
overview: In Dr. Azuma's laboratory, an android rebels against his builder's orders and decides to invade Earth

title: Stake Victory on the Moonlight
overview: The young super android draws energy from the sun but will have to fight in the moonlight this time.

title: Find Tomorrow in the Ruins
overview: During a fight against robots, Kyashan saves Luna, Tetsuja's childhood friend.

title: Channel Anger into the MF Gun
overview: Luna's father, a great friend of Dr. Azuma, created a magnetic field gun.

title: Don’t Blow Out the Flame of Battle
overview: kyashan must help the rebels to defeat the robots.

title: Raging Wind Friender
overview: The mechanical swan Swanee is likely to be discovered by going to report the plans of the evil commander.

title: An Oath to the Hero Kikero
overview: Kyashan has to defend a country from robots, but nobody trusts him.

title: The Roar of the Wild Beast Robot
overview: The robot invented by Yoko's father should be more powerful than Flender.

title: Concerto in the Flames of War
overview: Kyashan attends a concert and to stop Brikin's advance he uses all his energy.

title: Stake Life in the Desert of Death
overview: A magnetic storm puts an oil plant in the desert in danger.

title: Statue of the Demon
overview: The evil Briking ordered to have a statue built with his features.

title: The Iron Train of Evil
overview: Briking has decided to move the fortress to the underground city which can be reached only by train.

title: Android 5, the Robot of Betrayal
overview: Android #5 joined Kyashan to fight robot evil.

title: The Town That Doesn’t Need Casshan
overview: The mayor of the city wants to surrender to Bricking.

title: Puppy Runs for Vengeance
overview: Dr. Dynar has been working on Tnb dynamite for years, which has devastating power.

title: Swanee’s Wings of Love
overview: Bordeau is a natural fortress that would allow Briking to be unbeatable.

title: The Robot Lullaby
overview: 00A is a robot spy that must insert the electronic brains into the machines of the plant and take over the city but something goes wrong.

title: Giant Elephant Vs. Andro Force
overview: The city of Waight is besieged by robots, due to its strategic position.

title: The Clown Robot of Terror
overview: A special robot wants to destroy other cities and this time it is even more dangerous because children like it.

title: Casshan Gets the Death Penalty
overview: The state of Yuden is in danger, where Kyashan's only ally is the small Kit.

title: Robot Hijack
overview: The robots threaten in an airplane full of passengers to force Luna to reveal the truth about Kyashan's hiding place.

title: Runaway Robot, Romeo
overview: A metalliferous hill above a quiet city is the next target for robots.

title: Great Escape from the Robot Factory
overview: Billy tries to escape the robot factory.

title: Bounder Robot’s Challenge
overview: Kyashan faces a new robot made of a special rubber.

title: Immortal Casshan
overview: After using the destructive beam, Kyashan lost his memory.

title: Casshan's Secrets
overview: Briking discovers that Kyashan is not human.

title: The Missing MF Gun
overview: Luna, wounded in battle, is taken to safety by a girl who hates robots.

title: The Calvary of Anger
overview: The Karlman tribe lives on the belief that loneliness brings peace, but now they are threatened by robots.

title: High-Heat Robot Neotaros
overview: kyashan faces a robot made of fire.

title: The Premiere Robot Terminators
overview: Kyashan meets a man who has become famous for hunting and destroying 31 robots.

title: The City That Creates Newly-Made Men
overview: Engineer Miseru conducts experiments on the transformation of men into androids.

title: The Electric Punch of Tears
overview: A gigantic robot, with which Kyashan played when he was a child, has now been transformed into a weapon of war.

title: Swanee in Danger
overview: The swan robotic Swanee, in which Dr. Auzma's wife is hidden, has been captured.

title: Casshan Vs. Robot Ace
overview: Azuma tells his wife that he invented a way to destroy Briking.

title: The Greatest Showdown on Earth
overview: Dr. Azuma's strategy is to take advantage of Halley's comet passage.
